title: aster philippinensis
intro: Aster philippinensis, also known as Philippine aster, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aster philippinensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Aster philippinensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and wounds.
